Label: QML
Short description: Applies quantum computing to machine learning

Label: circuit building
Short description: Builds and outputs Qiskit quantum circuits.

Label: circuit manipulation
Short description: Optimizes or modifies Qiskit quantum circuits.

Label: cloud service
Short description: Requieres an account in a cloud service.

Label: demo
Short description: Implements a demo or a proof of concept.

Label: error correction
Short description: Performs or investigates quantum error correction

Label: high-level synthesis
Short description: Implements Qiskit's HLS plugin interface to synthesize quantum circuits from more abstract operations

Label: optimization
Short description: Applies quantum computing to optimization problems

Label: provider
Short description: Implements a Qiskit provider or/and Qiskit primitives

Label: research
Short description: Implements ideas from papers and/or cutting-edge research

Label: transpiler stage
Short description: Implements Qiskit's transpiler plugin interface to compile and optimize quantum circuts

Label: unitary synthesis
Short description: Implements Qiskit's unitary synthesis plugin interface to synthesize unitary operations into quantum circuits
